= uppercase





Converts all characters in a string to uppercase

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.foo.uppercase()

# In:  {"foo":"hello world"}
# Out: {"foo":"HELLO WORLD"}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.code = this.product_code.uppercase()

# In:  {"product_code":"abc-123"}
# Out: {"code":"ABC-123"}
----
